title: PINN-SFT: Physics-Informed Neural Network Solar Surface Flux Transport Code
description: Physics-informed neural-network and source-informed surface flux transport framework for reconstructing, validating, and forecasting the large-scale solar surface magnetic-field evolution across Solar Cycles 21-25. Includes a corrected finite-volume reference solver, analog-ensemble hindcast/forecast pipeline, and WSO synoptic-map data processing utilities.
